MACHINE LEARNING FULL TOPIC LIST (0 → 100%)

- Types of ML (Supervised, Unsupervised, Reinforcement)
- ML Pipeline Overview
- Dataset Structure (features, labels)
- Training vs Testing vs Validation

2. Data Preprocessing
- Data Cleaning

- Feature Selection

- Train-Test Split

3. Supervised Learning
- Regression Basics
- Classification Basics
- Linear Regression
- Logistic Regression

4. Unsupervised Learning
- Clustering (K-Means, Hierarchical)
- DBSCAN
- Dimensionality Reduction (PCA, t-SNE)
- Association Rule Learning (Apriori, Eclat)
- Anomaly Detection

5. Model Evaluation
- Confusion Matrix
- Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 Score
- ROC-AUC Curve
- Cross Validation (K-Fold)
- Hyperparameter Tuning (Grid Search, Random Search)
- Metrics for Regression (MSE, RMSE, MAE, R²)

6. Probabilistic & Statistical ML
- Probability Basics
- Bayes Theorem

- Hidden Markov Models (HMM)

7. Ensemble Learning

9. Advanced ML Concepts
- Regularization (L1, L2)
- Feature Importance

10. ML Systems & Production
